title: I need a clip
wikitext:
[]: I need a clip             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Feb 17, 2006 1:34 pm Does anyone know where I can find a good clip of Unit 01 going Berserk on Sachiel? One that I don't have to download; I can just watch it on the internet?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Feb 17, 2006 1:43 pm Define "good".

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Feb 17, 2006 2:36 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Define "good".

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Feb 17, 2006 2:53 pm You could get the DVD, though I can appriciate that it may not be the easiest thing to get ones hands on, epspecially without a credit card. Would you be satisfied with the scene in Japanese?

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Fri Feb 17, 2006 3:03 pm to the part when he screames as Unit 01's head falls off and he makes eye-contact.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Feb 17, 2006 3:06 pm Yeah, the language isn't all that important. I just want to show this to a friend of mine; The poor soul has never seen Evangelion but is very interested in it. I really want to show him this clip but can't find it anywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Feb 17, 2006 3:19 pm I can get it for you, but can your email handle it?

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Feb 17, 2006 3:41 pm Sure thing.
